defs: A small beetle (Anobium tessellatum and other allied species). By forcibly striking its head against woodwork it makes a ticking sound, which is a call of the sexes to each other, but has been imagined by superstitious people to presage death.
A small wingless insect, of the family Psocidæ, which makes a similar but fainter sound; -- called also deathtick.
quotes: She is always seeing apparitions and hearing deathwatches.
I did not hear the dog howl, mother, or the deathwatch beat.

defs: The guard set over a criminal before his execution.
